nodes.label: PartTypeInformation
nodes.description: A Part Type Information represents an item in the Catena-X Bill of Material (BOM) on a type level in a specific version.

nodes.label: partTypeInformation
nodes.description: The part type from which the serialized part has been instantiated.

nodes.label: partSitesInformationAsPlanned
nodes.description: A site is a delimited geographical area where a legal entity does business (geographical address with geo coordinates). A site always has a primary physical address. It is possible that further physical addresses are specified for the site. P.O. box details are only possible in addition to the physical address. A site has a 1:n relation to addresses, means at least one address is necessary and multiple addresses are possible.

nodes.label: siteId
nodes.description: The identifier of the site according to BPDM. The siteId must be a valid BPN. The BPN is a unique, unchangeable identifier for business partners / company locations from foundation to closure, regardless of the different business relationships / structures between or within the business partners or company locations.

nodes.label: function
nodes.description: The function of the site in relation to the part (i.e. the activity within the value chain of the part that is performed at the site).

nodes.label: functionValidFrom
nodes.description: Timestamp, from when the site has the specified function for the given part.

nodes.label: functionValidUntil
nodes.description: Timestamp, until when the site has the specified function for the given part.

nodes.label: PartTypeInformationCharacteristic
nodes.description: The characteristics of the part type.

nodes.label: partSitesInformationAsPlannedCharacteristic
nodes.preferredName: Part Sites Information as Planned Characteristic
nodes.description: The characteristic of the part site information that represents a set of possible site to a respective part.

nodes.label: PartTypeInformationEntity
nodes.description: Encapsulation for data related to the part type.

nodes.label: partSitesInformationAsPlannedEntity
nodes.preferredName: Part Sites Information as Planned Entity
nodes.description: Describes the ID, function and validity date of a site for the associated part in the AsPlanned context.

nodes.label: FunctionCharacteristic
nodes.description: Describes the characteristics of the function for a site related to the respective part.
